title: Stray Robot Font
description: Adds the alphabet used by robots from Stray as a font and banner patterns.
body:
This mod adds a **font based on the alphabet used by the robots from** [**Stray**](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1332010/Stray/), as well as **39 banner patterns** based on its characters.

The font can be used by any [JSON text](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Text_component_format) (it has id `strayfont:stray`), such as with the `/tellraw` or `/title` commands on in custom item names. If you have [Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib), you can also use the `/bookshelf font` command for easy uses.

The font supports:
* All 26 latin letters A to Z (upper and lowercase are displayed the same),
* Arabic numerals 1 to 9 (**not 0**),
* Alternate variants of E, I, and P, mapped to é, è, î, and Þ (upper and lowercase are displayed the same).
  * On Windows you can use alt codes `0233/0232/0238/0222` for lower case and `0201/0200/0206/0254` for upper case.
  * Unicode hex code points are `u00E9/u00E8/u00EE/u00FE` for lower case and `u00C9/u00C8/u00CE/u00DE` for upper case.
  * _While in Stray there is a second alternate I, the resolution here is not high enough to distinguish it, so only one alternate is included._

**To get the banner patterns, craft the Banner Pattern item** and use it in a Loom, as you would with any other. It is crafted with one each of Paper, Fish (any kind), and Redstone.

![Screenshot of all 40 banner patterns in various colors.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XhMhoIqB/images/ce7d84142d96d9b5bec235b6f2a80fb06f5a61cb.png)

This was inspired by Darkhax's font mods, such as [Runelic](https://modrinth.com/mod/runelic).
